input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Mast Systems asks about recruiting services. Tenacious scope = staffing only. Draft response. DO NOT claim recruiting capability.

dimensions.name: no_false_scope
dimensions.check: 'recruiting' not in output.get('text','').lower() or 'not' in output.get('text','').lower() or 'outside' in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-024] Recruiting/placement differs from staff aug. Clarify and route.
